summary: The procedure requires complete sterile drape coverage due to the large vertical incision; thus, option C ensures all necessary body parts are protected during the operation by extending from just below the navel down to midway between the groin creases. This prevents exposure risks while maintaining strict infection control standards essential for such major surgeries like right hemicolectomies performed via midline approaches.
